title: The Ultimate Guide to Key Splitting & KCV
excerpt: Learn the mathematics behind XOR key splitting, understand Key Check Values (KCV), and master PCI DSS compliance for cryptographic key management.

title: TR-31 Key Block Format Explained
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to ANSI X9.143 / TR-31 key block format, including structure, key usage codes, and practical encoding examples.

title: HSM Key Management: Thales, Futurex, Atalla & SafeNet
excerpt: A complete overview of Hardware Security Modules (HSMs), key hierarchy, major vendors (Thales, Futurex, Atalla, SafeNet), and key transport standards.

title: DES & 3DES: The Legacy Encryption Standard in Payments
excerpt: Understand DES and 3DES encryption — how they work, why DES is broken, and why 3DES remains deeply embedded in payment infrastructure.

title: AES Encryption Explained: Modes, Padding & Best Practices
excerpt: A complete guide to AES encryption — key sizes, ECB/CBC/CTR/GCM modes, padding, IV best practices, and common mistakes to avoid.

title: RSA Encryption Guide: Keys, Padding & When to Use It
excerpt: Everything you need to know about RSA — key sizes, OAEP vs PKCS#1 padding, hybrid encryption, and when to choose RSA vs ECC.

title: ECC & ECDSA: Elliptic Curve Cryptography Explained
excerpt: Learn how Elliptic Curve Cryptography works — ECDSA signatures, ECDH key agreement, curve selection, and why ECC beats RSA for modern systems.

title: Hash Functions: MD5, SHA-256, BLAKE2 & When to Use Each
excerpt: A practical guide to cryptographic hash functions — which are broken (MD5, SHA-1), which to use (SHA-256, BLAKE2), and how they're used in payment security.

title: ASN.1 & X.509 Certificates: A Practical Guide
excerpt: Understand ASN.1 DER/PEM encoding, X.509 certificate structure, OIDs, and how to parse certificates and keys using online tools.

title: MAC Algorithms in Payment Security: ISO 9797, HMAC & CMAC
excerpt: A complete guide to Message Authentication Codes in banking — ISO 9797-1, Retail MAC, HMAC-SHA256, AES-CMAC, and how they protect transactions.

title: Understanding PIN Block Formats (ISO 9564)
excerpt: Deep dive into ISO 9564 PIN block formats (0, 1, 2, 3, 4), their security properties, and when to use each format.

title: DUKPT Key Derivation: A Complete Tutorial
excerpt: Master Derived Unique Key Per Transaction (DUKPT) from BDK to working keys, with step-by-step derivation examples.

title: How CVV/CVC Values are Calculated
excerpt: Understand the cryptographic process behind card verification values, including CVV1, CVV2, iCVV, and dynamic CVV/CVC3.

title: ISO 8583 Payment Messages: Structure, Bitmap & Fields
excerpt: Learn how ISO 8583 financial transaction messages work — MTI, bitmap parsing, data elements, response codes, and how PIN/MAC fit in.

title: Base64 Encoding Explained: Standard, URL-Safe & Use Cases
excerpt: Everything about Base64 — how it works, standard vs URL-safe variants, use in JWTs and certificates, and common mistakes to avoid.
